nasb.text: Thus says the Lord, “What injustice did your fathers find in Me, That they went far from Me And walked after emptiness and became empty?

esv.text: Thus says the Lord: “What wrong did your fathers find in me that they went far from me, and went after worthlessness, and became worthless?

cnv.text: 耶和華這樣說： “你們列祖在我身上究竟發現了甚麼不義， 使他們遠離我， 隨從虛無的偶像， 自己也成了虛妄呢？

ccb.text: 耶和华说： “你们的祖先在我身上找到什么过错， 以致他们远离我， 去追随虚妄的神明， 使自己变得虚妄呢？
